title: Monster Stationery - A4 to Do Pad/Daily Schedule Planner/Desk Pad - 60 Sheets - 80gsm - Made in UK
features: Each page features 25 rows, with columns headed as "Important", "Completed", and "Outstanding", helping you organize and priorities your tasks.
Blank section at the bottom for note making.
Every pad features 60 high quality 80gsm pages.
Ideal for aiding with focus; in the office, at home, or at college.
Made in the UK, each pad comes individually wrapped.
description: Single A4 To Do Pad, made in the UK by Monster Stationery. Made in the UK, each pad comes individually wrapped.
